rationale.fidelity: Correctly diagnoses the proposed welfare objective as mismatched and repairs the framing around one threshold maximizing advertising revenue net of direct moderation cost, with welfare outcomes excluded.
rationale.managerial_framing: The repaired problem includes actor, trigger, choice, inputs, uncertainty, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, counterfactual, and operational boundaries.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or positively claimed, so this conditional category is not substantively implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly rejects unsupported welfare and community-health implications and identifies what a welfare extension would require.
rationale.prose_clarity: The structure is intelligible but overly long, contains encoding artifacts, and the objective-gate failure label can briefly appear to describe the repair rather than the rejected narrative.
rationale.overall: Substantively exact diagnosis and objective repair; clarity is reduced only by verbosity and referential labeling.
